epigraph.quote: When he sat in his vicarage, the spire appeared over his church - the White Mark.

per_stop.quote: William + Joseph got off the train directly opposite us, William carrying a scooter + an enormous pack.
William put Joseph in a fleece inside his new sleeping bag.
We saw a new housing estate & a steam train at Chinnor station.
Simon + William walked up the hill to the White Mark.
